name: Freshworks Inc.
description: Freshworks Inc. is a software-as-a-service (SaaS) provider that develops business software for customer support, sales, and marketing. The company's products include Freshdesk, a customer support platform, Freshservice, an IT service management solution, and Freshsales, a customer relationship management tool. Freshworks aims to make it fast and easy for businesses to delight their customers and employees by providing modern, intuitive, and affordable software solutions.
